.se

Prices updated 6 hours ago
  • TLD List

  • .se

The .se domain extension is the internet country code top-level domain (ccTLD) for Sweden, similar to how .uk is for the United Kingdom. This domain extension is managed by The Internet Infrastructure Foundation, also known as Internetstiftelsen. It's often used by websites that operate in Sweden or want to target a Swedish audience. Despite being a country-specific domain, it’s gained international interest and popularity because "se" can also stand for words like 'search engine' or 'solar energy'. Controversies over domain registration policies under .se have been relatively rare.

All you need to know about .se domains

The .se domain extension is the internet country code top-level domain (ccTLD) for Sweden. It came into operation in 1986, making it one of the original ccTLDs, and is administered by The Internet Foundation in Sweden (IIS). Notably, .SE carried out a reform in 2003 which abolished the former requirement of a local presence for registration and opened it up to any entity within the European Union. This led to a rapid increase in registrations. Nowadays, it serves as an essential platform for digital identities in Sweden, promoting the usability of internet with a focus on stability and security.
Owning a domain name with the .se extension mainly provides a localized identity as it signifies a strong connection to Sweden. It helps a business to portray a strong presence in the Swedish market, which can improve trust and credibility amongst local customers. Furthermore, the .se extension may improve search engine ranking for queries originating from Sweden, enhancing online visibility and potentially driving more traffic to your site. The .se domain is also governed by Swedish law, which can offer additional peace of mind for local businesses and customers alike.
The .se domain extension is primarily used by individuals and businesses based in Sweden, as it represents the country code top-level domain (ccTLD) for this area. It can serve as a tool for businesses to display their direct connection and commitment to this particular market, which can enhance their credibility among local customers. Furthermore, the .se domain can improve the local search engine optimization (SEO) for businesses trying to target Swedish audience. In some situations, Swedes living abroad may also use the .se extension to highlight their origins. Finally, the .se domain might be utilized in a creative context by tech businesses to play on words, since "se" can mean "see" in English.

.se Frequently Asked Questions

A .se domain name is the internet country code top-level domain for Sweden. It is commonly used by Swedish businesses, organizations, and individuals to reflect a presence in the country in their websites. The .se domain respects the privacy of the registrant and is managed by The Internet Foundation in Sweden.
A .se domain name extension is primarily used to target internet users in Sweden, a key step in local SEO strategy for that region. Your website may be viewed as more trustworthy to Swedish users with this local domain. Also, it can help protect a brand or trademark within Sweden.
Anyone can buy a .se domain name. There are no specific residence requirements or restrictions based on nationality. Both individuals and businesses can register a .se domain.
A .se domain name can be purchased from any of the providers in the Registrars list.
